since_last: 42% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.91%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.88% · Gold -0.16% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 42% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.91%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.91%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.09%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.07%, AVAV +2.52%, GOOGL +1.92%, WDAY +1.82%, NOW +1.73%. Laggards: SKHY -6.09%, ARM -4.90%, TSM -4.20%, DELL -3.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.35% at $135.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
